name: io.github.whosoeverm8/knowmind
title: knowmind
description: Tenant-scoped knowledge graph and long-term memory backend for AI agents. Recall, relations, stats and health (read-mostly by default) plus optional store/link/unlink.

environmentVariables.name: KNOWMIND_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer API token from the knowmind.de Dashboard -> API-Tokens (https://knowmind.de/dashboard/api-tokens)
